title: Ani's fakemon cobblemon
description: Adds 5 pokemon in total, 1 evolution line of 3 fakemon and 2 eevee evolutions
body:
### This datapack currently adds in 5 new fakemon
Current pokemon added:
- Glasmol (water/poison) uncommon spawn at beach biome
- Glacidrake (water/dragon) rare spawn at beach biome
- Dratlantic (water/dragon) ultra rare spawn at beach biome
- Knighteon (Steel) rare spawn at villages and strongholds, evolves from eevee after right clicking on one with an iron sword in your hand
- Punkeon (Rock) rare spawn at strongholds and dripstone caves, evolves from eevee after right clicking on one with a hard stone in your hand

2 of them can be used as a submarine type mounts.
I intend on expand this addon overtime whenever I get new ideas for fakemon so expect more in the future, I aim to prioritize quality over quantity.

Server use is okay if I'm given credits somewhere and the Pokémon are not put behind paywalls (subscriptions, donations, season passes, etc.)

### HOW TO INSTALL
Copy and paste the addon's .zip file into your resourcepack and datapack folders (if using something like Global Packs)

If the prior method doesn't work copy and paste the addon's zip file into your resource pack folder, then enter the game, make a new world, go to the datapack tab and paste it into the world's datapack folder too.
